concept_classifications.rationale: Grounding state file EXISTS at UUID path. Phase 4 can verify. Values are identical. Phase 8b path gap is architectural, not semantic.
Same CEU IDs and names in global ceu_registry.json and grounding_state_v3.json ceu_grounding list.
dom_path_domain_layer.json does not exist at source_manifest.dom_layer_path. Topology values in baseline vault are derived from this absent file. Cannot verify or reproduce.
structure_path directory absent. BlueEdge structural scanner output never committed to k-pi-core. Baseline topology was derived via PATH_EVIDENCE_ONLY (not from 40.x scanner).
extracted_path absent. BlueEdge source was analyzed from external archive not present in repo.

Pre-generic schema (bindings/domain_telemetry) is not the same as generic pipeline schema (nodes/edges/capability_surfaces). fastapi_conformance precomputed artifacts absent. Schema translation not possible without source artifacts.

Values were computed from 40.3 structural topology using RUN_RELATIVE_OUTLIER method. Method is identical to generic pipeline. Values reproducible IF structural data available. Currently blocked by Phase 5 binding dependency.
Zone derivation is deterministic from signal activations. Would reproduce identically if signal computation reaches completion.
Formula is deterministic: coverage_percent=100% → coverage_points=35; reconstruction=PASS → 25; completion=NOT_EVALUATED → 0. Total=60. Same inputs produce same output with zero ambiguity.
Deterministic from grounding state (10 SOURCE_TRUTH CEUs).
File exists at UUID path (same path as source_manifest.integration_validation_path). Phase 8a can access it. Phase 8b VR-08/09 cannot (run_dir path gap). Values confirmed identical.
Not produced by generic pipeline. PIOS_40.7 artifact from prior contract chain. Out of generic pipeline scope — this is a gap, not a regression.
New artifact. Would be produced by Phase 8b if pipeline reaches it. Currently blocked at Phase 2.

classification_note: Semantic values that CAN be reproduced (gauge, coverage, reconstruction, signals) are EXACT or DERIVABLE. The blocking gaps are architectural: 4 source artifact paths missing (intake, structure, DOM, fastapi_conformance), 1 schema incompatibility (binding). No value-level violations detected — all divergences are path or schema gaps.
